html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Andreja’s hair has already moved past its most intense shedding and is now entering regrowth 🌱. Ongoing emotional stress can still nudge the cycle, but this phase‑specific plan helps her regain calm and control—anchoring sleep, easing mental load, and rebuilding nutrition. By supporting steady rhythms and calmer days, the plan moves her from early regrowth toward full stabilization. Each small, consistent practice strengthens new sprouts and prevents back‑slides—proof that recovery is happening and can keep accelerating.

Stay consistent—the new growth you see now is just the beginning.
